title: Authors and Citation
text: Lukavsky J (2026). jatosR: Downloading Data JATOS Servers. R package version 0.5.0, https://github.com/visionlabels/jatosR.
code: @Manual{,   title = {jatosR: Downloading Data From JATOS Servers},   author = {Jiri Lukavsky},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.5.0},   url = {https://github.com/visionlabels/jatosR}, }

title: Downloading Data From JATOS Servers
text: goal jatosR help downloading data JATOS server (example MindProbe). package provides thin wrapper around JATOS api. package simplifies process eliminating need download data manually. improves reproducibility, simplifies team collaboration enables building dashboards showing progress data collection. JATOS experiment based jsPsych want analyze data within R, check also sister package jspsychread.

title: Downloading Data From JATOS Servers
text: package active development. can install current version GitHub following code:
code: # Install devtools package if necessary if(!"devtools" %in% rownames(installed.packages())) install.packages("devtools")  # Install the stable verion from GitHub devtools::install_github("visionlabels/jatosR")

title: Downloading Data From JATOS Servers
text: basic example shows solve common problem: want check process without API token living JATOS instance: can also check final state :
code: library(jatosR)  url <- "https://www.myjatosinstance.org" # don't publish your token! token <- "Bearer jap_xXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXx"  cc <- define_connection(url, token) test_connection(cc)  meta <- get_metadata(cc, batch_id = 100) results <- get_results(cc, batch_id = 100) r <- process_results(meta, results) r$data library(jatosR)  # returns demo data and saves a copy of zipped data into working directory demo <- prepare_demo() r <- process_results(demo$meta, demo$results) r$data clean_demo() # cleans the local zipped data library(dplyr) library(jatosR)  data("demo_srt_processed")

title: Downloading Data From JATOS Servers
text: sake simplicity, example used API token directly. However, want token code. can store .Renviron file jatosR code, executed given computer, gets authorized. Get JATOS API token. might good idea dedicated user account API access. Run usethis::edit_r_environ() open .Renviron file directly Type JATOS_PAT="" paste API token. line resemble : Restart R check token gets loaded

title: Demo clean up — clean_demo
code: demo <- prepare_demo() r <- process_results(demo$meta, demo$results) r #> $meta #> $meta$api_version #> [1] "1.0.1" #>  #> $meta$study_id #> [1] 13827 #>  #> $meta$study_uuid #> [1] "dd8432a4-7827-4d4f-8785-56aba5a5f61c" #>  #> $meta$study_title #> [1] "jsPsych 7 Simple Reaction Time Task (clone)" #>  #> $meta$study_results_node_count #> [1] 4 #>  #>  #> $data #> # A tibble: 4 × 26 #>    id_sr uuid     study_code start_date_sr       end_date_sr         duration_sr #>    <int> <chr>    <chr>      <dttm>              <dttm>              <drtn>      #> 1 442488 41b9678… aiJynkFlN… 2024-03-22 16:35:36 2024-03-22 16:36:02 26 secs     #> 2 442489 3d16e38… aiJynkFlN… 2024-03-22 16:36:10 2024-03-22 16:36:39 29 secs     #> 3 442490 e317ffc… aiJynkFlN… 2024-03-22 16:36:56 2024-03-22 16:37:19 23 secs     #> 4 442491 e97b34d… aiJynkFlN… 2024-03-22 16:37:26 2024-03-22 16:37:56 30 secs     #> # ℹ 20 more variables: last_seen_date <dttm>, study_state <chr>, #> #   worker_id <int>, worker_type <chr>, batch_id <int>, batch_uuid <chr>, #> #   batch_title <chr>, group_id <lgl>, component_results_node_count <int>, #> #   id_cr <int>, component_id <int>, component_uuid <chr>, #> #   start_date_cr <dttm>, end_date_cr <dttm>, duration_cr <drtn>, #> #   component_state <chr>, data_path <chr>, data_filename <chr>, #> #   data_size <int>, data_raw <chr> #>  clean_demo()

title: Parser of componentResults data — component_result_info
text: Extracts fixed set fields single componentResults entry (parsed JATOS JSON metadata) flat list. Missing fields fall back typed NA, result always list size-one vectors can safely row-bound tibble, e.g. dplyr::bind_rows() done process_results.

title: Parser of componentResults data — component_result_info
Parser of componentResults data — component_result_info
text: cr list corresponding single componentResults entry, e.g. json$data[[1]]$studyResults[[1]]$componentResults[[1]]

title: Parser of componentResults data — component_result_info
text: Named list size-one vectors: id_cr, component_id, component_uuid, start_date_cr, end_date_cr, duration_cr (computed end_date_cr - start_date_cr), component_state, data_path, data_filename, data_size.

title: Parser of componentResults data — component_result_info
code: demo <- prepare_demo(nofile = TRUE) json <- demo$meta |> httr2::resp_body_json() cr <- component_result_info(   json$data[[1]]$studyResults[[1]]$componentResults[[1]] ) cr #> $id_cr #> [1] 605082 #>  #> $component_id #> [1] 21204 #>  #> $component_uuid #> [1] "e4bf0e8e-c09a-424d-8ed4-236e0295d6d7" #>  #> $start_date_cr #> [1] "2024-03-22 16:35:36 UTC" #>  #> $end_date_cr #> [1] "2024-03-22 16:36:02 UTC" #>  #> $duration_cr #> Time difference of 26 secs #>  #> $component_state #> [1] "FINISHED" #>  #> $data_path #> [1] "/study_result_442488/comp-result_605082" #>  #> $data_filename #> [1] NA #>  #> $data_size #> [1] 5775 #>

title: Define JATOS connection — define_connection

text: url Base URL JATOS instance (API endpoints) token API token obtained JATOS instance. Defaults JATOS_PAT environment variable (e.g. set .Renviron).

title: Define JATOS connection — define_connection
text: simple list url token values, passed jc functions test_connection, get_metadata, get_results.

title: Define JATOS connection — define_connection
text: Check https://www.jatos.org/JATOS-API.html#personal-access-tokens process getting token. need worry trailing slash URL (automatically removed). omit "Bearer " part token, token seems valid, starts "jap", "Bearer " part added.

text: jc JATOS connection info, e.g. define_connection batch_id Integer identifier particular experiment batch. Mutually exclusive component_id. component_id Integer identifier particular experiment component. Mutually exclusive batch_id.

title: Get metadata for JATOS results — get_metadata
text: HTTP response object returned httr2::req_perform(). actual metadata stored response body can analyzed process_results. provided batch_id component_id added response object.

title: Get metadata for JATOS results — get_metadata
text: Exactly one batch_id component_id must provided; function errors neither given.

code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ cc <- define_connection(   "https://www.myjatosinstance.org",   "Bearer jap_xXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXx" ) meta <- get_metadata(cc, batch_id = 100) meta$batch_id } # }

text: Get raw data JATOS results

title: Get raw data for JATOS results — get_results
code: get_results(jc, batch_id = NULL, component_id = NULL, filename = NULL)

title: Get raw data for JATOS results — get_results
text: jc JATOS connection info, e.g. define_connection batch_id Integer identifier particular experiment batch. Mutually exclusive component_id. component_id Integer identifier particular experiment component. Mutually exclusive batch_id. filename Optional path file zipped data stored; parent directories created needed. provided, temporary file created system's temporary directory.

title: Get raw data for JATOS results — get_results
text: HTTP response object returned httr2::req_perform(). zipped data written filename (temporary file), whose path available body, can analyzed process_results. provided batch_id component_id added response object.

title: Get raw data for JATOS results — get_results
text: Exactly one batch_id component_id must provided; function errors neither given.

title: Get raw data for JATOS results — get_results
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ cc <- define_connection(   "https://www.myjatosinstance.org",   "Bearer jap_xXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXx" ) results <- get_results(cc, batch_id = 100) results$batch_id # Name of the temporary file with the zipped data results$body } # }

title: Simple Response Time demo — prepare_demo
text: Loads bundled demo_srt dataset, canned copy meta results responses get_metadata/get_results return Simple Reaction Time Task example study. network connection required.

title: Simple Response Time demo — prepare_demo
Simple Response Time demo — prepare_demo
text: nofile Default FALSE. Use TRUE need meta (e.g. inspect fields study_result_info/component_result_info) intend call process_results(), requires zip file copied working directory.

title: Simple Response Time demo — prepare_demo
text: List meta results, can passed process_results. Unless nofile = TRUE, also copies file srtdemo.zip working directory, since results$body refers relative path; remove afterwards clean_demo().

title: Simple Response Time demo — prepare_demo
code: demo <- prepare_demo() r <- process_results(demo$meta, demo$results) r #> $meta #> $meta$api_version #> [1] "1.0.1" #>  #> $meta$study_id #> [1] 13827 #>  #> $meta$study_uuid #> [1] "dd8432a4-7827-4d4f-8785-56aba5a5f61c" #>  #> $meta$study_title #> [1] "jsPsych 7 Simple Reaction Time Task (clone)" #>  #> $meta$study_results_node_count #> [1] 4 #>  #>  #> $data #> # A tibble: 4 × 26 #>    id_sr uuid     study_code start_date_sr       end_date_sr         duration_sr #>    <int> <chr>    <chr>      <dttm>              <dttm>              <drtn>      #> 1 442488 41b9678… aiJynkFlN… 2024-03-22 16:35:36 2024-03-22 16:36:02 26 secs     #> 2 442489 3d16e38… aiJynkFlN… 2024-03-22 16:36:10 2024-03-22 16:36:39 29 secs     #> 3 442490 e317ffc… aiJynkFlN… 2024-03-22 16:36:56 2024-03-22 16:37:19 23 secs     #> 4 442491 e97b34d… aiJynkFlN… 2024-03-22 16:37:26 2024-03-22 16:37:56 30 secs     #> # ℹ 20 more variables: last_seen_date <dttm>, study_state <chr>, #> #   worker_id <int>, worker_type <chr>, batch_id <int>, batch_uuid <chr>, #> #   batch_title <chr>, group_id <lgl>, component_results_node_count <int>, #> #   id_cr <int>, component_id <int>, component_uuid <chr>, #> #   start_date_cr <dttm>, end_date_cr <dttm>, duration_cr <drtn>, #> #   component_state <chr>, data_path <chr>, data_filename <chr>, #> #   data_size <int>, data_raw <chr> #>  clean_demo()

text: Parses JATOS metadata (studyResults/componentResults tree) shared process_results process_results_from_file, regardless whether came live API response local export. metadata processed ; neither function adds actual response data (column data_raw) returns.

title: Turns JATOS metadata JSON into a single table — process_metadata_from_text
Turns JATOS metadata JSON into a single table — process_metadata_from_text
text: txt JSON metadata text, URL, path JSON file — passed jsonlite::fromJSON(), accepts forms

title: Turns JATOS metadata JSON into a single table — process_metadata_from_text
text: list meta General info like study ID API version data Tibble meta data, one row per study/component result

title: Turns JATOS metadata JSON into a single table — process_metadata_from_text
code: fn <- system.file("extdata", "srtdemo_jatos_results.zip", package = "jatosR") tmpfolder <- tempfile() utils::unzip(fn, exdir = tmpfolder) r <- process_metadata_from_text(file.path(tmpfolder, "metadata.json")) r #> $meta #> $meta$api_version #> [1] NA #>  #> $meta$study_id #> [1] 13827 #>  #> $meta$study_uuid #> [1] "dd8432a4-7827-4d4f-8785-56aba5a5f61c" #>  #> $meta$study_title #> [1] "jsPsych 7 Simple Reaction Time Task (clone)" #>  #> $meta$study_results_node_count #> [1] 4 #>  #>  #> $data #> # A tibble: 4 × 25 #>    id_sr uuid     study_code start_date_sr       end_date_sr         duration_sr #>    <int> <chr>    <chr>      <dttm>              <dttm>              <drtn>      #> 1 442488 41b9678… aiJynkFlN… 2024-03-22 16:35:36 2024-03-22 16:36:02 26 secs     #> 2 442489 3d16e38… aiJynkFlN… 2024-03-22 16:36:10 2024-03-22 16:36:39 29 secs     #> 3 442490 e317ffc… aiJynkFlN… 2024-03-22 16:36:56 2024-03-22 16:37:19 23 secs     #> 4 442491 e97b34d… aiJynkFlN… 2024-03-22 16:37:26 2024-03-22 16:37:56 30 secs     #> # ℹ 19 more variables: last_seen_date <dttm>, study_state <chr>, #> #   worker_id <int>, worker_type <chr>, batch_id <int>, batch_uuid <chr>, #> #   batch_title <chr>, group_id <lgl>, component_results_node_count <int>, #> #   id_cr <int>, component_id <int>, component_uuid <chr>, #> #   start_date_cr <dttm>, end_date_cr <dttm>, duration_cr <drtn>, #> #   component_state <chr>, data_path <chr>, data_filename <chr>, #> #   data_size <int> #>

title: Turns metadata and data into a single table — process_results
text: list meta General info like study ID API version data Tibble meta data, column data_raw stores results entry text format. can parsed example jsonlite jspsychread packages

title: Turns metadata and data into a single table — process_results
text: Combines metadata returned get_metadata raw data downloaded get_results: zip file referenced results$body unzipped temporary folder, data.txt study/component result read memory, temporary folder removed . results NULL body downloaded file (.e. get_results called, called without filename/default temporary file), warning issued data_raw left NA every row instead erroring.

title: Turns metadata and data into a single table — process_results
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ cc <- define_connection(   "https://www.myjatosinstance.org",   "Bearer jap_xXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXxXx" ) meta <- get_metadata(cc, batch_id = 100) results <- get_results(cc, batch_id = 100) r <- process_results(meta, results) } # }

what: Turns metadata and data into a single table, from a local results file — process_results_from_file
title: Turns metadata and data into a single table, from a local results file — process_results_from_file
text: Like process_results, reads metadata raw data single zip archive already downloaded disk (e.g. exported JATOS web interface), instead combining separate get_metadata/get_results API responses. archive expected contain top-level metadata.json plus data folder per component result, mirroring layout produced JATOS's results export.

title: Turns metadata and data into a single table, from a local results file — process_results_from_file
Turns metadata and data into a single table, from a local results file — process_results_from_file
text: path Path zip file results metadata

title: Turns metadata and data into a single table, from a local results file — process_results_from_file
text: list meta General info like study ID study title data Tibble meta data, column data_raw stores results entry text format. can parsed example jsonlite jspsychread packages

title: Turns metadata and data into a single table, from a local results file — process_results_from_file
code: fn <- system.file("extdata", "srtdemo_jatos_results.zip", package = "jatosR") r <- process_results_from_file(fn) r #> $meta #> $meta$api_version #> [1] NA #>  #> $meta$study_id #> [1] 13827 #>  #> $meta$study_uuid #> [1] "dd8432a4-7827-4d4f-8785-56aba5a5f61c" #>  #> $meta$study_title #> [1] "jsPsych 7 Simple Reaction Time Task (clone)" #>  #> $meta$study_results_node_count #> [1] 4 #>  #>  #> $data #> # A tibble: 4 × 26 #>    id_sr uuid     study_code start_date_sr       end_date_sr         duration_sr #>    <int> <chr>    <chr>      <dttm>              <dttm>              <drtn>      #> 1 442488 41b9678… aiJynkFlN… 2024-03-22 16:35:36 2024-03-22 16:36:02 26 secs     #> 2 442489 3d16e38… aiJynkFlN… 2024-03-22 16:36:10 2024-03-22 16:36:39 29 secs     #> 3 442490 e317ffc… aiJynkFlN… 2024-03-22 16:36:56 2024-03-22 16:37:19 23 secs     #> 4 442491 e97b34d… aiJynkFlN… 2024-03-22 16:37:26 2024-03-22 16:37:56 30 secs     #> # ℹ 20 more variables: last_seen_date <dttm>, study_state <chr>, #> #   worker_id <int>, worker_type <chr>, batch_id <int>, batch_uuid <chr>, #> #   batch_title <chr>, group_id <lgl>, component_results_node_count <int>, #> #   id_cr <int>, component_id <int>, component_uuid <chr>, #> #   start_date_cr <dttm>, end_date_cr <dttm>, duration_cr <drtn>, #> #   component_state <chr>, data_path <chr>, data_filename <chr>, #> #   data_size <int>, data_raw <chr> #>

what: Transforms raw data to JSON list — raw_json
title: Transforms raw data to JSON list — raw_json
text: Takes raw results stored data_raw adds new column data_json containing data lists created jsonlite package. package jsonlite must installed function work. expected parameter d dataset obtained process_results, dataset can simpler, column data_raw used.

title: Transforms raw data to JSON list — raw_json
Transforms raw data to JSON list — raw_json
text: d Tibble data obtained process_results, list containing tibble data element. Errors neither shape provided.

title: Transforms raw data to JSON list — raw_json
text: Tibble new list column data_json, input list data tibble replaced (see Details)

title: Transforms raw data to JSON list — raw_json
text: Function process_results returns list (assume called results), raw_json intended used tibble pipeline, .e. result$data tibble. simplify process, function detects, whether provided list containing tibble called data. case, processes data tibble, puts back original list returns .

title: Transforms raw data to JSON list — raw_json
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ demo <- prepare_demo() r <- process_results(demo$meta, demo$results) # working with tibbles rdata <- r$data |> raw_json() # shortcut for the results list also works r <- r |> raw_json() clean_demo() } # }

title: Transforms raw data produced by jsPsych to tibble — raw_jspsych
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ demo <- prepare_demo() r <- process_results(demo$meta, demo$results)  # working with tibbles rdata <- r$data |> raw_jspsych() rdata |> dplyr::select(start_date_sr, data_jspsych) rdata$data_jspsych[[1]]  # shortcut for the results list also works r <- r |> raw_jspsych()  clean_demo() } # }

title: Parser of studyResults data — study_result_info
text: Named list size-one vectors: id_sr, uuid, study_code, start_date_sr, end_date_sr, duration_sr (computed end_date_sr - start_date_sr), last_seen_date, study_state, worker_id, worker_type, batch_id, batch_uuid, batch_title, group_id, component_results_node_count.

title: Parser of studyResults data — study_result_info
code: demo <- prepare_demo(nofile = TRUE) json <- demo$meta |> httr2::resp_body_json() sr <- study_result_info(json$data[[1]]$studyResults[[1]]) sr #> $id_sr #> [1] 442488 #>  #> $uuid #> [1] "41b96789-9b73-4185-97ad-f56455ad3ef4" #>  #> $study_code #> [1] "aiJynkFlNJj" #>  #> $start_date_sr #> [1] "2024-03-22 16:35:36 UTC" #>  #> $end_date_sr #> [1] "2024-03-22 16:36:02 UTC" #>  #> $duration_sr #> Time difference of 26 secs #>  #> $last_seen_date #> [1] "2024-03-22 16:35:37 UTC" #>  #> $study_state #> [1] "FINISHED" #>  #> $worker_id #> [1] 471179 #>  #> $worker_type #> [1] "GeneralMultiple" #>  #> $batch_id #> [1] 15883 #>  #> $batch_uuid #> [1] "204a2801-2a1b-42e9-8ae5-dbfa8d4fde67" #>  #> $batch_title #> [1] "Default" #>  #> $group_id #> [1] NA #>  #> $component_results_node_count #> [1] 1 #>

title: Test JATOS connection — test_connection
text: Checks personal access token jc valid calling JATOS admin token endpoint. Use httr2::resp_status() result verify 200 response, wrap call tryCatch() since httr2::req_perform() raises error HTTP error statuses.
